# X Ray Computed Tomography

**Summary**: A non-destructive imaging technique used to visualize internal structures and changes in rock samples.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-badhafere|BADHAFERE, 2024]] used x-ray-computed-tomography to monitor the development of wormholes in carbonate rocks.

## Key Results and Findings

- CT scanning revealed that higher temperatures led to more rapid and extensive formation of wormholes, increasing porosity and permeability. ([[2024-badhafere|BADHAFERE, 2024, p. 38]])
